title: Where Do Evas Come From
wikitext:
[]: Where Do Evas Come From?             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Nov 10, 2009 7:47 pm Not sure if this has come up before, but discussions in the Evangelion faces thread got me thinking about the Eva graveyards, the early days of Nerv, and the production of the Eva series. Specifically, I got to thinking about Units 03,04 and the MP Evas and their production. Specifically where their "organic" production took place. We know that the other Evangelions were "manufactured" at various other lcoations around the world. But where were they originally created or indeed "grown". Were they grown at Nerv's Tokyo-3 branch and then shipped abroad. Or did Nerv ship embryonic Evangelions to other branches which slowly matured? Or did other branches have total facilities for creating (and researching) Evangelions themselves? Any ideas? Do we series or supplemental material on this?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Nov 10, 2009 9:36 pm Well, it is generally considered that the Evas are clones of Adam, so is it possible that the cloning took place before Second Impact, or that samples of Adam were taken before Second Impact and shipped across the world for testing, then after Second Impact these samples were used in the cloning process that created the Evas?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Nov 10, 2009 9:44 pm I’d have to say things probably got started in Tokyo-3. They have the graveyard there, so I would assume that’s where they started their first attempts at making Evas. After they perfected the process they began sending the fruits of their labors to the other Nerv bases around the world.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Nov 10, 2009 10:12 pm Well, it is generally considered that the Evas are clones of Adam, so is it possible that the cloning took place before Second Impact, or that samples of Adam were taken before Second Impact and shipped across the world for testing, then after Second Impact these samples were used in the cloning process that created the Evas?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 11, 2009 12:51 am I've always like the idea of taking some of the marshmallow mommy's and making a giant version of a test tube baby.

[]: Re: Where Do Evas Come From?             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Nov 11, 2009 2:22 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Where Do Evas Come From?

[]: Re: Where Do Evas Come From?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 11, 2009 9:20 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Where Do Evas Come From?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Nov 11, 2009 9:58 am This is what Unit 01's creation looked like, and what li'l Shinji saw when his mother disappeared: According to the CI, Adam was blown to countless chunks during 2I, from which the other Evas may or may not have been generated. The process may well have been quite different for the non-01 Evas. But your main question was the location, and we see this location in this shot and we get a greater relative idea of the location from episode 20 and the fact that the liner notes state that Unit 01 was still attached to Lilith when Yui was assimilated.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 11, 2009 11:30 am Look how in shape Lilith looks, she really let herself go in the show.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Nov 11, 2009 11:39 am Well that WAS 15 years later after all.

[]: Re: Where Do Evas Come From?             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Nov 11, 2009 11:41 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Where Do Evas Come From?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Nov 11, 2009 12:15 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Well that WAS 15 years later after all.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Nov 11, 2009 12:43 pm Obviously it's her pregnancy fat.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Nov 11, 2009 5:00 pm We know for a certainty that Unit-01 was created at Nerv HQ, and the same for Unit-00 too. But what about Unit-02, Unit-03, Unit-04 and the MP Evas? Do you think they were created completely outside the Geofront?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Nov 11, 2009 8:36 pm Uh...we KNOW that. Factually.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Nov 12, 2009 12:40 pm Completely created outside it? Are we sure they might not have been first created at Nerv HQ, then shipped elsewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Nov 12, 2009 12:51 pm Eva-00 was constructed at the Geofront, unless I'm misremembering Episode 21. Evas two through four could have started there and been relocated. HOWEVER, all the MP Evas were constructed completely outside of Nerv HQ. That's why they're all so "Buuhhhh?!" in 22 or 23 or 24 or whenever it is they get mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:15 pm Legendary wrote: HOWEVER, all the MP Evas were constructed completely outside of Nerv HQ. That's why they're all so "Buuhhhh?!" in 22 or 23 or 24 or whenever it is they get mentioned.

Specifically, I got to thinking about Units 03,04 and the MP Evas and their production. Specifically where their "organic" production took place
